commands.command:
from astropy.io import fits
hdul = fits.open('file.fits')
commands.description: Read a FITS file using Astropy
commands.scenario: Read a FITS file using Astropy

commands.command:
from astropy.wcs import WCS
wcs = WCS(hdul[0].header)
commands.description: Get WCS information from a FITS file
commands.scenario: Get WCS information from a FITS file

commands.command:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
plt.imshow(hdul[0].data, cmap='gray')
plt.show()
commands.description: Plot a FITS image using Matplotlib
commands.scenario: Plot a FITS image using Matplotlib
